productName: Zen Hash Rosin - Grape Cream Cake - 1g
description: Double-refined indica hash rosin from Grape Cream Cake — washed, sifted, and cold-pressed with zero solvents, sitting right at the peak of the solventless pyramid. Maximum flavor, zero solvents, with notes of vanilla, grape, and nutty, and a slow, mellow wind-down vibe.
